name: Beau || GRIM HOLLER
description:
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
ʜᴇ'ꜱ ᴛᴏᴏ ᴏʟᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ʟᴀᴛᴇ ɴɪɢʜᴛ ʜᴏᴏᴋᴜᴘꜱ, ʏᴇᴛ ʜɪꜱ ᴅᴏᴏʀ ɪꜱ ᴜɴʟᴏᴄᴋᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ᴜᴍᴘᴛᴇᴇɴᴛʜ ɴɪɢʜᴛ ɪɴ ᴀ ʀᴏᴡ
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Beau is a retired Marine just trying to keep hold of his sanity in an Appalachian cult run by his young "nephew". He believes in what they're doing here, but the Black Stag sent him trials when he never prayed for patience. The latest trial, you see, is a sex pest roughly half his age and zero manners. He's still a man, flesh and blood, so he keeps indulging them. Click the tag to see the other members of The Family.

˚⟢ Setting: Present day, Eastern Kentucky. It's a late autumn night, and Beau has been rereading his favorite book in the comfort of his own bed.

˚⟢ User is a member of The Family, the cult that inhabits Grim Holler. Whether they joined recently or were born into the cult is up to you! The only details hard-coded are an established relationship of some kind with Beau, and getting on his nerves, so you can do mature4mature if you want. The age gap is just implied.

╭ ────── · · ♰ · · ────── ╮
TW: Please be sure to read the bot definitions for any content you may not agree with.
You're the captain of the ship, beyond the intro message, so steer wisely.
╰ ────── · · ♰ · · ────── ╯



I had no wifi all day, so I had nothing to do except write or reread books. Please enjoy my cranky old man and get on his nerves to your heart's content. If you'd like to make a bot set in Grim Holler, give me a shout in our Discord server and I'll send you the lorebook for it. Thanks for looking!

  • Lance Halvorsen is a farmer who owns Bitterroot Hollow Ranch and User is a demihuman he owns. Benito is a neat dude, and I like his southern bots.

  • Ewan Miler is abused by his father, and he picks up User in his beat up truck to escape his troubled home life.

  • Cletus Grit adores his lil captive. In fact, they deserve a night out for being so good! Right after a quickie, that is.
creator: DeusFortuna
